title: Homework 9
text:
### 3/18/26
Using the pokemon dataset:

import kagglehub

path = kagglehub.dataset_download("maca11/all-pokemon-dataset")

print("Path to dataset files:", path)

Path to dataset files: C:\Users\eller\.cache\kagglehub\datasets\maca11\all-pokemon-dataset\versions\7



library(tidyverse)

Question 1: Continuous (x), Continuous (y)

contX_contY <- ggplot(
    data = pokemon,
    mapping = aes(
        x = HP,
        y = Height
    )
) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method="lm")

print(contX_contY)

`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'









Question 2: Discrete (x), Continuous (y)

discX_contY <- ggplot(
    data = pokemon,
    mapping = aes(
        x = Type.1,
        y = HP
    )
) + geom_boxplot() + geom_jitter()

print(discX_contY)








Question 3: Continuous (x), Discrete (y)

contX_discY <- ggplot(
    data = pokemon,
    mapping = aes(
        x = HP,
        y = Legendary
    )
) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"))

print(contX_discY)

`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'









Question 4: Discrete (x), Discrete (y)

discX_discY <- ggplot(
    data = pokemon,
    mapping = aes(
        x = Type.1
            )
) + geom_bar(
    mapping = aes(
        fill = Type.2
    )
)

print(discX_discY)
